title: calamintha glabella var. nuttallii
intro: Calamintha glabella var. nuttallii, also known as Nuttall's calamintha, is a rare and lesser-known variety of the calamintha plant, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Nuttall's calamintha include relief from digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin irritations, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Nuttall's calamintha can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
